title: Russian sanctions provide sharp boost to tanker optimism
section_path: Russian sanctions provide sharp boost to tanker optimism
section_path_text: Russian sanctions provide sharp boost to tanker optimism
summary:
Main
Over the past 24 hours the US announced sanctions on Rosneft and Lukoil and the EU has released its long-awaited 19th Russian sanctions package. Over the same time, Brent has risen over 5% to around $66/bbl. TD3c balmo FFAs moved from an already strong WS82 yesterday to WS88 today.

children.title: Main
